title: New Agent OS is INSANE!
summary: Agent OS is an operating system for coordinating multiple AI agents like Hermes and Jarvis in unified workflows. It uses Kanban boards for task triage, supports agent orchestration through group chat and pipelines, and integrates tools like Obsidian and NotebookLM for memory and content generation, with deployment options for SEO automation and other tasks.
writeup: The video walks through Agent OS, a system for coordinating multiple AI agents such as Hermes and Jarvis within unified workflows. It shows task triage through Kanban boards and agent orchestration via group chat and pipelines, plus integrations with Obsidian and NotebookLM for memory and content generation. Deployment options cover SEO automation among other tasks, and the demo touches on local models, a CLI, and test-time compute.
